name: ARENIX
short_description: Arenix is a brutal endless top-down shooter with thousands of monsters and even more bullets. Death is inevitable, but how long can you survive?
detailed_description:
Arenix is a brutal fast-paced top-down shooter with thousands of monsters and even more bullets. Moving all the time is your only chance to survive. Stop for a moment and you're dead. Death is inevitable, but how long can you survive?

• Endless mayhem
• Different types of enemies
• Original soundtrack
• And just a lot of GUNS GUNS GUNS
about_the_game:
Arenix is a brutal fast-paced top-down shooter with thousands of monsters and even more bullets. Moving all the time is your only chance to survive. Stop for a moment and you're dead. Death is inevitable, but how long can you survive?

• Endless mayhem
• Different types of enemies
• Original soundtrack
• And just a lot of GUNS GUNS GUNS
supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Swedish, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese
